definitions: He rescues someone or something from danger or harm.
He keeps and stores something for future use.
He prevents the expenditure of money, time, or effort.
In sports, he prevents an opponent from scoring.
He delivers someone from sin or damnation.
examples: He saves the day with his quick thinking.
He saves money every month for a new car.
He saves time by taking the shortcut.
The goalkeeper makes a brilliant save.
He saves souls through his ministry.
